sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23303" key="dakruxe/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δακρῠ-χέων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ουσα</itype>, wrongly written for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δάκρυ χέων</foreign> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hom.</author></bibl>, etc.: hence <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nonn.</author> </bibl> formed <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δακρυχέειν</foreign> in trans. sense, <sense id="n23303.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bewail, D.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.532</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
